sqlReaderQuery.value:
select max(WatermarkValue) as oldWaterMarkValue
from dbo.watermarkTable

select * from dbo.FactBookings
where booking_date > '@{activity('Old watermark value').output.firstRow.OldWaterMarkValue}'

text.value:
update dbo.watermarktable set watermarkValue = '@{activity('New watermark value').output.firstRow.NewWaterMarkValue}'
where tablename = 'FactBookings'

sqlReaderQuery.value:
select watermarkValue as oldWatermarkValue from [dbo].[watermarktable]
where tableName = '@{item().TableName}'
